pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RM-K-002 (Risk Management/Knowledge) scores 0.423 composite (highest: NICE at 0.423). Scope is edge_case for Clinical AI Specialist: 0 in-scope signals, 0 out-of-scope signals. Seniority is appropriate.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with edge_case scope, Risk Management, composite 0.423. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Risk Management for Clinical AI Specialist at this seniority?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Risk Management appears in ~40% of Clinical AI Specialist postings as a secondary competency. Clinical risk management overlaps with AI safety and post-market surveillance. Zero role-specific signals insufficient for inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. Risk Management without role signals not market-supported. Final decision: exclude.
